description: A key customer needs an order delivered sooner than the standard lead time. Sales must check if this is possible and what the expedite fee would be.

nodes.task_description: Check with production scheduling to see if the manufacturing can be expedited.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates with the scheduling department and finds that the order can be made 2 days earlier.

nodes.task_description: Check with logistics for the cost of expedited freight (e.g., team drivers, air freight).

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a quote from a carrier for expedited shipping, which adds $500 to the cost.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer that the order can be expedited for an additional fee of $500 and await their approval before proceeding.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the options and costs to the customer.
